prestazioni: LS9 (6.2L Supercharged V8) engine: Replace the OEM Eaton TVS2300 supercharger with a Magnuson TVS2650 supercharger kit (12 psi boost, 850+ HP) paired with a custom billet crankshaft from Callies Performance Products (4340 forged steel, 4.000" stroke) and Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 compression, coated skirts).

Exhaust system: Full titanium 3.5" diameter headers by Stainless Works (equal-length, 1-7/8" primaries) merging into a dual-mode Borla XR-1 Sport cat-back system (valved, 304 stainless steel, 4" tips) with a custom X-pipe featuring Vibrant Performance 1799 resonators for backpressure optimization.

Suspension & Handling: Full Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilover kit (2-way adjustable, 46mm pistons, 22-way compression/rebound damping) with custom-spec springs (front: 800 lb/in, rear: 600 lb/in) and a Corvette-specific sway bar upgrade from Hotchkis (28mm front, 25mm rear, hollow-core, adjustable end links).
estetica: Widebody conversion: RK Sport C6 ZR1 Extreme Widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, 2.5" wider front, 3.5" wider rear, OEM-style fitment) with custom-molded carbon fiber side skirts and a rear diffuser by APR Performance (GT-250 model, 3-piece, adjustable angle).

Aerodynamics: Front splitter by Anderson Composites (carbon fiber, 3-stage adjustable, 4.5" overhang) paired with a custom rear wing from Vararam (G3 model, 72" span, 12" chord, carbon fiber, 3D-printed aluminum mounts for 150+ lbs downforce at 150 mph).

Wheel & Stance: Forged HRE FF15 20x12" (front) and 20x13" (rear) wheels (ET20 front, ET50 rear, 5x120 bolt pattern) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (345/25R20 front, 355/25R20 rear) with a custom air ride setup by Air Lift Performance (3P management, AccuAir e-Level, Corvette-specific strut mounts).
